zh.lifeSummary: 當John Pitfield於1609年出生在英國時，他的父親John Pitfield40歲，母親Anne Zouche37歲。他於1629年7月27日與Agnes Payne在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特 聖 薛維爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1696年7月在英國戴文享年87歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Pitfield
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Pitt, a well, and feld, a field, pasture, plain, meaning a plain full of excavations

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Pitfield was born in 1609, in England, his father, John Pitfield, was 40 and his mother, Anne Zouche, was 37. He married Agnes Payne on 27 July 1629, in Exeter St Sidwell, Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in July 1696, in Devon, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Pitfield est né en 1609, à Angleterre, son père, John Pitfield, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Anne Zouche, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Payne le 27 juillet 1629, à Exeter St Sidwell, Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en juillet 1696, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre.

Juli 1629 in Exeter St Sidwell, Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom Agnes Payne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ko.Exeter Saint Sidwell, Devonshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 시드웰
ko.lifeSummary: John Pitfield(이)가 1609년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Pitfield(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Zouche(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1629년 7월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 시드웰에서 Agnes Payne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1696년 7월 영국 데폰에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Pitfield nasceu em 1609, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Pitfield, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Anne Zouche, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Payne em 27 de julho de 1629, em Exeter St Sidwell, Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em julho de 1696, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.Exeter Saint Sidwell, Devonshire, Englan: эксетир ст сидвелл, эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Pitfield родился в 1609 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Pitfield было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Zouche, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Payne 27 июля 1629 г. в местности эксетир ст сидвелл, эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер июль 1696 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия.
